title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 12 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 12 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 12 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 12/11/2025
Iron ore futures stabilized and rebounded today, holding up well throughout the session. The most-traded contractI2601 closed at 774 yuan, up 1.38% slightly from the previous working day. Spot cargo prices at ports rose 5-10 yuan/mt from the previous working day, with PB fines transac on prices in Shandong at 780-781 yuan/mt, up 5-8 yuan/mt from yesterday, and PB fines transac on prices in Hebei at 790-793 yuan/mt, up 8-10 yuan/mt from yesterday.
